name: rethink
description: First-principles design mode. Research best practice in similar use cases, then propose a clean-slate design from requirements — not the current implementation.

interface.longDescription: Research best practice for the problem class, then propose a clean-slate design derived from requirements — treating the current implementation as gap-measurement, not the template.
defaultPrompt: Use Rethink mode for this design.
How should this be designed from first principles?
Rethink this subsystem from the requirements up.
